title: taraxacum ascitum
intro: Taraxacum ascitum, also known as the sticky dandelion or sticky dandelion weed, is a perennial herb belonging to the dandelion family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of constipation. The health benefits of Taraxacum ascitum include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating various conditions such as arthritis, ulcers, and skin irritations. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
